title: O'Reilly Automotive, Inc. (ORLY) Q3 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: O'Reilly Automotive, Inc. (NASDAQ:ORLY ) Q3 2023 Earnings Conference Call October 26, 2023 11:00 AM ET Company Participants Jeremy Fletcher - Chief Financial Officer Greg Johnson - Chief Executive Officer Brad Beckham - Co-President Brent Kirby - Co-President Greg Hensley - Executive Chairman David O'Reilly - Executive Vice Chairman Conference Call Participants Michael Lasser - UBS Brett Jordan - Jeffries Daniel Imbro - Stephens Zach Fadem - Wells Fargo Simeon Gutman - Morgan Stanley Christopher Hoevers - JPMorgan Operator Welcome to the O'Reilly Automotive Inc. Third Quarter 2023 Earnings Call. My name is Holly and I will be your operator for today's call.

title: O'Reilly (ORLY) Q3 Earnings Top Estimates, Comps Grow 8.7%
text: For 2023, O'Reilly (ORLY) now envisions total revenues in the range of $15.7-$15.8 billion, up from the prior guidance of $15.4-$15.7 billion.

title: O'Reilly Automotive (ORLY) Q3 Earnings and Revenues Surpass Estimates
text: O'Reilly Automotive (ORLY) came out with quarterly earnings of $10.72 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $10.36 per share. This compares to earnings of $9.17 per share a year ago.

title: O'Reilly Automotive, Inc. Reports Third Quarter 2023 Results
text: SPRINGFIELD, Mo., Oct. 25, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- O'Reilly Automotive, Inc. (the “Company” or “O'Reilly”) ( Nasdaq: ORLY), a leading retailer in the automotive aftermarket industry, today announced record revenue and earnings for its third quarter ended September 30, 2023.

title: O'Reilly: Leadership Transition For Future Growth
text: The aftermarket auto part industry is consolidating and O'Reilly has been gaining market share until becoming the market leader. Returns on invested capital are over 25% and buybacks have reduced the share count by 5.8% annually. Brad Beckham has been appointed as the new CEO, he started as a Parts Specialist in 1996.

title: Citi cuts Tractor Supply, Floor & Decor to neutral on traffic weakness while O'Reilly Automotive gets an upgrade
text: Citi analyst Steven Zaccaro on Thursday cut Tractor Supply Co. and Floor & Decor Holdings to neutral from buy after the bank's store-traffic monitor signaled lower-than-expected business at the retailers.

title: O'Reilly Automotive: Buy It For Parts
text: O'Reilly Automotive Inc offers attractive risk/reward and could be worth at least $1,091/share, 27% higher than the current price. Growing demand for vehicles and parts, rising miles traveled, and continued expansion in the company's store network contribute to ORLY's favorable risk/reward. O'Reilly's profitability moat, market share growth, and recession hedge position the company well in the auto parts industry.

title: O'Reilly Automotive, Inc. Announces Dates for Its Third Quarter 2023 Earnings Release and Conference Call
text: SPRINGFIELD, Mo., Oct. 02, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- O'Reilly Automotive, Inc. (the “Company” or “O'Reilly”) (Nasdaq: ORLY), a leading retailer in the automotive aftermarket industry, announces the release date for its third quarter 2023 results as Wednesday, October 25, 2023, with a conference call to follow on Thursday, October 26, 2023.
